version_description: Corrected Chords in verse, chorus, and bridge.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Tabbed by Casey

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
It's amazing how you knock me off my feet[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D/F#[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Every time you come around me I get weak (oh, yeah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Nobody ever made me feel this way (oh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D/F#[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
You kiss my lips and then you take my breath away[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
So, I wanna know[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I wanna know what turns you on   (I'd like to know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
So I can be all that and more    (I'd to know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I'd like to know what makes you cry   (So)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]E7/G#[/ch]
So I can be the one who always makes you smile[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Girl he never understood what you were worth  (Mm, no)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D/F#[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
And he never took the time to make it work    (You deserve more love than that girl)(No)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D/F#[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Baby I'm the kind of man to show concern   (Yes I do)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
Anyway that I can please you let me learn[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I'd like to know what makes you cry   (So)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]E7/G#[/ch]
So I can be the one who always makes you smile[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Tell me what I got to do to please you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Baby anything you say I'll do[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D/F#[/ch]

From the bottom of my heart its true[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Tell me what I got to do to please you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Baby anything you say I'll do[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Cause I only wanna make you happy[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D/F#[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
I wish that I could take a journey through your mind (All right)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D/F#[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch] 
And find emotions that you always try to hide babe (Oh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D/F#[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D/F#[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
